attributes.action: Make period products free & accessible in the UK- SIGN NOW!
attributes.additional_details:
A menstrual cycle forms part of the female reproductive experience, yet it is heavily stigmatised & profited off. 

Period poverty is a barrier risking the health and wellbeing of girls & women, leaving 1 in 5 women unable to afford sanitary products. 

This petition calls for this to change. Period products should be free in all public spaces in the UK. Following a similar plan to the Period Products Act introduced by Scotland, we know this change is possible. 

Please sign and share!
attributes.background: This petition calls for the UK government to make period products free and accessible  in the UK (excluding Scotland).

departments.name: Department of Health and Social Care

rejection.details:
We think this petition is very similar to yours: 

Fund free female sanitary products for all women and girls: https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/756958
